name: Chunky Knit Wool Woven Rug - Threshold™
description:
An understated, underfoot accent comes in the form of the Chunky Knit Wool Rug from Threshold™. Natural fibers are woven to create a chunky honeycomb appearance, which is at home in any room in your house, given the neutral colors. The subtle variation in colors and thickness gives this rug a depth and richness that will translate to whatever room it's in.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
